verified_ok.claim: adapter exact argv is fixed and structured
evidence: tests/test_web_design_command_adapter.py asserts accounts_retire allowlist metadata and exact command execution

verified_ok.claim: browser payload is bounded to ui_action plus account_id
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py rejects browser command_id and unsupported payload keys before dispatch
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js account action click passes only account_id

verified_ok.claim: retire preflights accounts list before lifecycle execution
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py runs accounts list before account action args are admitted
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts accounts list precedes accounts retire for active targets
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts accounts list precedes accounts retire for reserve targets

verified_ok.claim: retire eligibility is active or reserve and already-retired targets are blocked before execution
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py rejects retired pool before adapter execution
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py allows retire only for active or reserve pools
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts retired target never executes accounts retire
tests/test_web_design_live_server.py asserts malformed accounts list returns UI_ACCOUNT_LIFECYCLE_ACCOUNT_LIST_INVALID without retire execution

verified_ok.claim: UI copy treats retire as terminal lifecycle retirement and not deletion or return path
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_live_server.py retire metadata says terminal account retirement request only
wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js retire button title says terminal lifecycle retirement
tests/test_web_design_ui.py guards against raw accounts retire and delete/return-path wording in UI files

verified_ok.claim: post-action truth refresh remains canonical accounts readonly
evidence: wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js chooses accounts readonly refresh on the Accounts screen

unresolved_gaps.adjudication: accepted for this bounded gate because adapter, static UI, and live-server harness tests prove command boundaries; full browser operator flow is scheduled for UI_WEB_END_TO_END_OPERATOR_FLOW

unresolved_gaps.item: global stronger confirmation system remains deferred
unresolved_gaps.adjudication: accepted because this contour uses existing confirmation metadata only; global redesign belongs to UI_WEB_CONFIRMATION_SYSTEM_HARDENING
